headline: Is Match Group (MTCH) Pricing Look Compelling After Prolonged Share Price Declines
summary: If you are wondering whether Match Group is attractively priced or still has room to fall, starting with a clear look at its current valuation can help you frame that decision. The stock recently closed at US$30.47, with returns of a 3.6% decline over 7 days, a 0.5% decline over 30 days, a 4.0% decline year to date and a 4.4% decline over the past year, while the 5 year return sits at a 79.5% decline and the 3 year return shows an 11.6% decline. Recent news coverage has focused on Match...
